description: A new customer wants to enroll in the hotel's loyalty program.

nodes.task_description: Explain the benefits of the loyalty program (e.g., points, free nights, upgrades).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly communicates the program's value proposition.

nodes.task_description: Collect the customer's personal information to create a new loyalty profile.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gathers all necessary details for enrollment.

nodes.task_description: Create the new loyalty account and provide the customer with their member number.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully creates the account and provides the member ID.
